event: checkout-api version 2026.05.14.3 finished rolling out to production
checkout-api p95 latency crossed 700ms alert threshold
checkout-api error rate exceeded 15 percent for 3 minutes
Initial hypothesis focused on a primary database slowdown because timeouts appeared in application logs
Metrics review showed database host connections stable while application pool waiters spiked sharply after the deploy
Recent config commit identified a reduced max pool size packaged in version 2026.05.14.3
Rollback to version 2026.05.14.2 approved and started
Latency and error rate returned to baseline after rollback
